data.title: American Bitcoin owned by the Trumps drops 8.4% before reverse stock split to remain listed on Nasdaq.
data.description: On Wednesday, the value of American Bitcoin owned by the Trump sons decreased significantly before the company's reverse stock split. This move is intended to support the company's shares and maintain its position on the Nasdaq stock exchange.

data.title: NTT Global Data Centers Report Reveals What It Will Take to Power the Next Wave of AI
data.description: In London, NTT DATA, a prominent player in AI and technology services, has unveiled a report titled "Can Data Centers Keep Pace with AI? A Global Data Center Outlook." This report analyzes if the current infrastructure can sufficiently support the upcoming AI advancements. In collaboration with NTT Global Data Centers and ThoughtLab, an economic consultancy, the report explores three scenarios for global data center growth until 2030. The study delves into the ability of data centers to scale and cater to the increasing demands of artificial intelligence in the future.

data.title: Dow Jones Futures: Techs Rise With Tesla, Jobs Report Ahead; Meta Jumps On AI Move
data.description: The stock market experienced a decline with the recent news surrounding Meta affecting SpaceX, Micron, and several artificial intelligence companies. Tesla is close to a potential buying point as it prepares for upcoming deliveries. Additionally, investors are anticipating the release of the June jobs report. Tech stocks, including Tesla, saw an increase in value, whereas Meta saw a boost in response to its AI development.

data.title: CaratIQ Announces Exclusive Partnership with Nationwide Jewellers to Bring AI-Powered Cloud POS Technology to Australia and New Zealand
data.description: In Sydney, CaratIQ, the AI operating system designed for jewelry stores, has revealed a new partnership with Nationwide, a top jewelry buying group in Australasia comprising over 400 jewelry stores. The exclusive deal establishes CaratIQ as the sole supplier of cloud-based point-of-sale systems, clienteling CRM software, and AI-driven retail technology for Nationwide's member group. This collaboration grants Nationwide members access to cutting-edge, jewelry-focused technology solutions.

data.title: Insilico Medicine Announces Collaboration with Takeda to Advance Strategic AI Drug Discovery
data.description: A collaboration has been established to utilize Insilico Medicine's Pharma.AI platform for developing new drug candidates within Takeda's various therapeutic fields. The announcement was made on July 1, 2026, in Cambridge, Massachusetts. Insilico Medicine, recognized for its advanced generative AI technology in drug discovery, revealed the partnership. The company's stock is listed on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange under the symbol 3696. This partnership aims to enhance the discovery and development of innovative pharmaceuticals across Takeda's sectors.

data.title: Jinko ESS and Taliva Energy Sign 400MWh Energy Storage Project Portfolio
data.description: In Munich on July 1, 2026, Jinko ESS, a prominent energy storage company and subsidiary of JinkoSolar Co., Ltd., joined forces with Taliva Energy, a clean energy company specializing in comprehensive energy storage solutions and large-scale energy infrastructure projects in Romania. The collaboration brings together two industry leaders to enhance energy storage capabilities and expand clean energy infrastructure in the region. This partnership aims to advance sustainable energy solutions and leverage their combined expertise to support the growing demand for renewable energy.

data.title: Guest Supply Signs Asia-Pacific Licensing Agreement with HAAN
data.description: On July 2, 2026, Hong Kong-based Guest Supply Asia disclosed an agreement with HAAN to produce and sell HAAN-branded personal care items specifically for hotels in the Asia Pacific region. The agreement signifies a significant move for the companies to provide these products to hotel customers in the region.
